findings.location: s3 — 派生元実行時情報の補足ノート
findings.description: The knowledge file states: "failureLogFormatter.derivedRequestIdPropName および failureLogFormatter.derivedUserIdPropName を使用することで、処理対象データから派生元のリクエストIDとユーザーIDを取得して出力できる" — but the source file never describes what these two properties do. They appear only in the configuration example (記述例) as property values (`insertRequestId`, `updatedUserId`) with no accompanying explanation. The source tip about 派生元実行時情報 discusses the `$data$` placeholder in general terms and refers to a separate section (`failure_log-output_src_exe_info`) for details, without linking `derivedRequestIdPropName`/`derivedUserIdPropName` to that feature.
findings.source_evidence: Source 記述例 only lists the properties in an example config block without description. Source tip says: "処理対象データの出力により、障害ログに派生元実行時情報を出力できる…派生元実行時情報の出力方法は、:ref:`failure_log-output_src_exe_info` を参照。" — no mention of derivedRequestIdPropName or derivedUserIdPropName in any descriptive context.
